text: Amazon Polly @ mosenconio. @ snen e Converts text into "life-like" speech ¢ Text (language) => Speech (Language) NO translation e Standard TTS = Concatenative (phonemes) * Neural TTS = phonemes => spectrograms => vocoder => audio e ... MUCH more human/natural sounding but more complex ¢ Qutput Formats - MP3.. Ogg Vorbis .. PCM... I like cats, dogs, ' chickens and rabbits. ————————————— » |[]|IIIIDI Spiders, not so much.
